hero.headline: Vignan Online MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with Logistics and Supply Chain Management specialisation from Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. NAAC A+, NIRF #70 University 2025, Deemed University. Rs 90,000 total fee across 4 semesters. Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month. Sem 3-4 covers LSCM electives across two semesters with Research-Based Learning projects.

sections.tldr: Vignan Online MBA Logistics and Supply Chain Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, NIRF #70 University 2025. Rs 90,000 total fee (4 semesters). Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through Vignan. Sem 3 covers Business Environment and Strategy plus three LSCM electives and a research project. Sem 4 covers Entrepreneurship Development plus three LSCM electives and a research project. Among the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBAs with a dedicated LSCM track in India.

about.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management is offered by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research (VFSTR), a Deemed University established in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. VFSTR holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. NIRF ranks it #70 among universities in 2025.

The LSCM specialisation covers six elective subjects across Semesters 3 and 4, along with Business Environment and Strategy, Entrepreneurship Development, and two Research-Based Learning projects. Specific LSCM elective subjects are confirmed with the Vignan counsellor at admission, as the detailed subject list is pending official publication on the portal.

At Rs 90,000 total, Vignan Online is among the cheapest UGC-DEB approved online MBAs with a logistics and supply chain management specialisation. The trade-off is limited brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh and South India. For supply chain, logistics, and procurement professionals who need the MBA credential at minimum cost, Vignan LSCM is a practical option.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Environment and Strategy
sem3Subjects.description: Study the external business environment, strategic analysis frameworks, and formulation of competitive strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: Elective I (LSCM)
sem3Subjects.description: Logistics and supply chain management elective subject. Specific topic confirmed with Vignan counsellor at admission.

sem3Subjects.name: Elective II (LSCM)
sem3Subjects.description: Logistics and supply chain management elective subject. Specific topic confirmed with Vignan counsellor at admission.

sem3Subjects.name: Elective III (LSCM)
sem3Subjects.description: Logistics and supply chain management elective subject. Specific topic confirmed with Vignan counsellor at admission.

sem3Subjects.name: Research-Based Learning-I
sem3Subjects.description: Conduct structured research on a logistics or supply chain topic using academic methodology, data collection, and analysis.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship Development
sem4Subjects.description: Study business model creation, startup finance, venture capital, and entrepreneurial risk assessment.

sem4Subjects.name: Elective I (LSCM)
sem4Subjects.description: Logistics and supply chain management elective subject. Specific topic confirmed with Vignan counsellor at admission.

sem4Subjects.name: Elective II (LSCM)
sem4Subjects.description: Logistics and supply chain management elective subject. Specific topic confirmed with Vignan counsellor at admission.

sem4Subjects.name: Elective III (LSCM)
sem4Subjects.description: Logistics and supply chain management elective subject. Specific topic confirmed with Vignan counsellor at admission.

sem4Subjects.name: Research-Based Learning-II
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied logistics or supply chain research project with data analysis, findings presentation, and recommendations.

syllabus.note: Specific LSCM electives are confirmed with the Vignan counsellor at admission. The detailed subject list is pending official publication on Vignan Online's portal. Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Vignan Online MBA specialisations. See the main Vignan Online MBA page for the core subject list. Syllabus applies to the 2025-26 admission cycle. Reconfirm current syllabus with our counsellor before enrolment.

whoHires.body:
Logistics and Supply Chain Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** E-commerce and logistics, Manufacturing, FMCG (supply chain), Retail, Automotive, Pharma (cold chain), Shipping and freight forwarding, Third-party logistics (3PL)

**Entry-level roles:** Supply Chain Analyst, Logistics Coordinator, Procurement Executive, Warehouse Operations Executive, Demand Planning Associate

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** Supply Chain Manager, Logistics Manager, Procurement Manager, Warehouse Manager, Demand Planning Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** VP Supply Chain, Director of Logistics, Chief Procurement Officer, Head of Operations, SVP Supply Chain and Fulfilment

**Typical hiring organisations:** Amazon India, Flipkart, Delhivery, BlueDart, Maersk, DHL, Mahindra Logistics, TCI Express, Hindustan Unilever (supply chain), Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Reliance Retail, ITC (supply chain), Larsen and Toubro

skills.body:
The LSCM specialisation builds skills tested by e-commerce, manufacturing, and logistics organisations:

**Technical skills:**
- Supply Chain Planning: demand forecasting, inventory optimisation, safety stock calculation, and production planning coordination
- Logistics Management: transportation mode selection, route optimisation, last-mile delivery design, and freight cost management
- Procurement: vendor evaluation matrices, contract negotiation, purchase order management, and supplier performance tracking
- Warehouse Management: warehouse layout design, WMS configuration, pick-pack-ship optimisation, and inventory accuracy management

**Applied skills:**
- Supply Chain Analytics: supply chain KPI dashboards, lead time analysis, fill rate tracking, and cost-to-serve modelling
- International Logistics: Incoterms application, customs documentation, freight forwarding coordination, and cross-border supply chain compliance

**Soft skills:** Vendor negotiation, cross-functional coordination between procurement, manufacturing, and sales teams, and supply chain risk communication to leadership.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Vignan Online MBA LSCM against peers:

**vs Galgotias Online MBA Operations (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias is Rs 3,600 cheaper with NAAC A+. Galgotias offers Operations Management (broader scope) while Vignan offers a dedicated LSCM track. Vignan adds NIRF #70 ranking.

**vs Uttaranchal Online MBA LSCM (Rs 94,000):** Uttaranchal is Rs 4,000 more with NAAC A+ and a fully published LSCM syllabus including International Logistics and Supply Chain Analytics. Vignan's LSCM electives are pending official publication. If syllabus transparency matters, Uttaranchal has the edge.

**vs DPU Online MBA LSCM (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is 2.1x the cost with NAAC A++ and NIRF #41. DPU offers a fully detailed LSCM curriculum with Pune manufacturing and logistics industry connections. Vignan is the budget alternative at less than half the fee.

At Rs 90,000, Vignan is the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBA with a dedicated LSCM track and NIRF ranking. The limitation is brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh and the fact that specific elective subjects are not yet published on the portal.

fees.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management is priced at Rs 90,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year programme). This makes Vignan Online among the most affordable UGC-DEB approved online MBAs in India.

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research starting Rs 5,700 per month. No external marketing partner or NBFC intermediary involved.

**Additional charges**: Registration, application, examination, and project fees are not separately documented on Vignan Online's portal. Please reconfirm all charges with our counsellor before enrolment.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Vignan Online each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and all applicable charges with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the Logistics and Supply Chain Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Vignan Online MBA LSCM students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Rajesh
items.liked: Rs 90,000 for a NAAC A+ online MBA in LSCM is the best deal available. The research projects forced me to apply concepts to my warehouse operations.
items.disliked: Elective subject names were not published upfront. Had to confirm with the counsellor after admission. More transparency on the syllabus would help.
items.body: I manage warehouse operations for an e-commerce company in Andhra Pradesh. The MBA credential helped me get promoted to warehouse manager. The research-based learning projects gave me applied frameworks for inventory optimisation and pick-pack efficiency. At Rs 90,000 with zero-cost EMI, there is no cheaper option with NAAC A+ for supply chain professionals.

items.name: Anitha
items.liked: Affordable enough to pay outright without any loan. EMI at Rs 5,700/month was a backup option I did not even need.
items.disliked: Vignan brand is not recognised by supply chain hiring managers in Chennai. Companies like Maersk, DHL, and Amazon look for MBAs from Symbiosis, NITIE alumni, or IIM distance programmes. Vignan does not register.
items.body: The LSCM programme is fine for the price but the brand limitation is real outside Andhra Pradesh. If you work in logistics in Chennai, Bangalore, or Mumbai and want to switch to a top logistics company, the Vignan name will not open doors. For internal promotions at your current employer, it checks the MBA box. Set expectations accordingly and pair it with APICS or CSCMP certifications.

items.name: Krishna
items.liked: The Entrepreneurship Development subject in Sem 4 helped me think about starting my own logistics business. Research projects were well-supervised.
items.disliked: No dedicated placement support for LSCM roles. Career services are campus-focused.
items.body: Good programme for logistics and supply chain professionals in Andhra Pradesh who want an affordable MBA. The research-based learning format across both semesters pushed applied thinking. I used my Research-Based Learning-II project on last-mile delivery optimisation as a working document for my company. For the price, the outcome was better than expected.

faqs.question: Is Rs 90,000 the total Vignan Online MBA fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. Rs 90,000 is the total programme fee spread across 4 semesters. Reconfirm any additional charges for registration, examination, or project with our counsellor before enrolment.

faqs.question: Does Vignan offer zero-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers zero-cost EMI directly at Rs 5,700 per month. No external NBFC or marketing partner is involved.

faqs.question: What is Vignan's NAAC grade?
faqs.answer: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research holds NAAC A+ accreditation. Verify the current status at naac.gov.in.

faqs.question: Are the LSCM elective subjects published on the portal?
faqs.answer: No. Specific LSCM elective subjects are confirmed with the Vignan counsellor at admission. The detailed subject list is pending official publication. Contact our counsellor for the current elective list before enrolling.

faqs.question: How does Vignan LSCM compare to Uttaranchal LSCM?
faqs.answer: Both are NAAC A+ and under Rs 1 lakh. Uttaranchal LSCM costs Rs 94,000 with a fully published syllabus including International Logistics and Supply Chain Analytics. Vignan is Rs 4,000 cheaper at Rs 90,000 but LSCM electives are not yet published.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved online MBA in LSCM at Rs 90,000 total fee.
You work in logistics, warehousing, or procurement and need the MBA credential for promotion.
You want zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through the university with no NBFC intermediary.
consider: If syllabus transparency is important, Uttaranchal LSCM (Rs 94,000, fully published syllabus) is Rs 4,000 more but offers complete subject visibility.
If you want a similarly priced alternative with operations focus, Galgotias Operations (Rs 86,400, NAAC A+) is Rs 3,600 cheaper.
If brand recognition at top logistics companies matters, DPU LSCM (Rs 1,89,400, NAAC A++, NIRF #41) is the premium option.
